Actions.Text: REFERRED TO HOUSING, CONSTRUCTION AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT

Title: Relates to notice period for eviction from a manufactured home park
Summary: Provides that a warrant for eviction from a manufactured home park shall give fourteen days notice, if such person rents a manufactured home in a manufactured home park from a manufactured home park owner or operator.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the real property law, in relation to evictions in manufactured home parks
